whatWasImplemented: supabase/migrations/20260418220000_plans.sql — creates plans table with caps/price columns, seeds Starter/Pro/Scale with caps matching mission.md ($24.99/2000/500/25, $49.99/7500/1500/100, $99.00/25000/5000/500).
Extended profiles with plan_id text FK -> plans(id) ON DELETE SET NULL (nullable — set on first checkout), plus current_period_start timestamptz (current_period_end already existed).

Relaxed profiles_subscription_status_check to Stripe's lifecycle vocabulary: 'trialing','active','past_due','canceled','incomplete','incomplete_expired','unpaid','paused'. Previous constraint used 'cancelled' (double-l) which would never match webhook payloads — defensive UPDATE included.
RLS on plans: public SELECT via 'Anyone can read plans' policy; no INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE policies, so anon/authenticated roles are silently blocked and only service-role can write.

scripts/create-stripe-prices.mjs — idempotent one-shot that creates 3 Stripe test-mode products + recurring prices and UPSERTs the stripe_price_id into each plan row. Refuses to run with an sk_live_ key. Skips plans whose stripe_price_id is already set (rotate by nulling first).
Added stripe@22.0.2 dependency (also consumed by M2F2 checkout, M2F3 webhook, M2F4 portal).

src/__tests__/plans-schema.test.ts — 11 assertions covering seed integrity, per-plan cap values, RLS public-read, RLS anon-write-blocked (INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE), service-role write permission, profile plan_id FK + subscription_status 'canceled'.
whatWasLeftUndone: scripts/create-stripe-prices.mjs not yet run — requires a real sk_test_... key from Brandon's Stripe dashboard. Plans table will have stripe_price_id=NULL until then; M2F2 tests use placeholder IDs via stripe-mock.
discoveredIssues: The inherited profiles_subscription_status_check used 'cancelled' (British/double-l) but Stripe's webhook payloads always use 'canceled' (single-l). Silent bug — any subscription.deleted event would have violated the constraint and failed the webhook. Fixed inline as part of this migration rather than deferring to a separate fix feature; behavior change is strictly additive (broader set of allowed values) and caught here by the RED test `subscription_status accepts canceled`.
Cloud Supabase project (luznxhpadjblwnkfzjhn) still has the old constraint. M8 hardening-launch will push migrations to production; until then, the cloud project is not in use for M2 development.

verification.testsRun: pnpm vitest run — 234 passed / 1 skipped / 32 files (11 new assertions, 0 regressions from baseline 223).

manualChecks.action: SELECT count(*) FROM plans via service-role client
